title: Every Sunday
style: cinematic warm golden-hour tones, soft indie film aesthetic with naturalistic window light, muted earth palette with amber accents

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: late-20s developer, tousled dark hair with a few loose curls, wearing a faded charcoal hoodie and slim dark jeans, focused expression with tired but lit-up eyes, slight stubble, holding a ceramic coffee mug, full-body casual standing pose

characters.name: Jamie
characters.description: mid-20s collaborator, curly auburn hair loosely pulled back, wearing an oversized vintage band tee and soft jogger pants, bright curious eyes and an easy wide grin, full-body relaxed sitting pose on a beanbag

scenes.image_prompt: Sunday morning kitchen, warm sunlight streaming through linen curtains onto a cluttered countertop, wide shot with soft haze in the air, glowing phone screen casting faint light upward
scenes.video_prompt: Alex slowly lowers the phone and looks up toward the light, a quiet smile spreading, subtle camera push-in
scenes.narration: Every Sunday starts with one question: what can we build today?

scenes.image_prompt: Small home studio desk covered in sticky notes and half-empty coffee cups, two monitors glowing with code editors, warm overhead lamp casting a focused cone of light, medium side-angle shot
scenes.video_prompt: Hands type rapidly, pause to drag a sticky note aside, fingers tap in rhythm, slight head bob of deep concentration
scenes.narration: Six hours. One idea. Zero excuses.

scenes.image_prompt: Same desk, laptop open showing a minimal AI chat interface prototype, late-afternoon amber light cutting across the room at a low angle, close-up on the laptop screen reflecting in wide-open eyes
scenes.video_prompt: Alex leans forward, types a test prompt, eyes widen as the AI responds — a quiet exhale, then a restrained fist-pump just below frame

scenes.image_prompt: Cozy living room corner, warm floor lamp beside a beanbag, phone held up displaying a clean prototype UI, soft evening glow filling the background, medium shot
scenes.video_prompt: Jamie scrolls through the prototype, eyebrows rising with growing delight, looks up and gives a slow thumbs-up toward camera
scenes.narration: First user feedback, straight from the couch.

scenes.image_prompt: Same desk at dusk, one monitor showing a live product page going public, another displaying a rising visitor counter, silhouette against dual screen glow, wide shot with room falling into shadow
scenes.video_prompt: Alex presses Enter, leans back in the chair, arms stretch upward in a slow victory stretch, quiet exhale as the room dims into evening
